comments: Approved. The commit 0dacec7 only introduces the execution-result.json and result-review-packet.json artifacts to the tasks/ directory. The Orchestrator logged the failure of the OMOC Synergy engine (due to zero-width space bugs and 'maxOutputTokens must be >= 1' internal errors) but successfully adhered to the Separation of Duties (SoD) protocol by refusing to hand-write patches or manually bypass the OMOC environment to edit src/mcp-server/src/index.ts or worktree-manager.ts. No unapproved state model or implementation changes occurred, validating the strict governance bounds.
